Jewellery

Celtic Silver Jewellery

Delicate sterling silver Celtic jewellery

📍 Cashel Market📍 Keel Market

About Celtic Silver Jewellery

Celtic Silver Jewellery brings the timeless elegance of Irish Celtic design to Achill Island Market. Every piece is crafted in sterling silver, featuring traditional Celtic motifs that have been part of Irish culture for thousands of years.

The collection includes beautifully crafted trinity knot earrings — one of the most recognisable Celtic symbols representing eternal love — crystal drop pieces that catch the light beautifully, and delicate star charms that make perfect everyday jewellery.

Each item is presented beautifully and makes a wonderful gift or keepsake from Ireland's Wild Atlantic Way. The sterling silver quality means these pieces will last a lifetime and only get more beautiful with age.

What You'll Find

☘️ Trinity Knot Earrings

Sterling silver trinity knots — the iconic Celtic symbol of eternal love.

💎 Crystal Drops

Sparkling crystal drop earrings and pendants in sterling silver settings.

⭐ Star Charms

Delicate star charm pieces — perfect for everyday wear or layering.

🎁 Gift-Ready

Beautifully presented pieces — ready to give as gifts or keepsakes.
